title: Mod Toggle
description: This Project lets you toggle mods on and off.
body:
Toggle Mods gives you total control over your Fabric modpack without ever having to leave the game and go back to your launcher. Tired of manually moving .jar files just to test a performance boost or disable a glitchy mod? Do it all from the title screen or while you play.

Features
Live Toggle: Enable or disable any mod in your folder with a single click.

One-Click Relaunch: Uses an advanced JVM-cloning process to restart Minecraft instantly. It bypasses the launcher, keeping your settings and window focus exactly where they were.

In-Game Access: Access the manager via a dedicated button on the Title Screen or a global keybind (Default: Right Shift).

Fully Customizable: Don't like Right Shift? Change the keybind in the standard Minecraft Controls menu.

How it Works
When you toggle a mod and hit "Apply," [Mod Name] handles the file management for you. It then clones the current Java environment, spins up a fresh instance of Minecraft with your updated mod list, and shuts down the old one. It’s the fastest way to manage a heavy modpack.

Usage
Open the menu using the button on the Title Screen or press Right Shift while in-game.

Toggle the mods you want to load or unload.

Click Apply & Relaunch.

Watch your game refresh itself automatically!

Technical Note
This mod requires the Fabric Loader. Because it creates a new Java process, you may see a brief moment where the window closes before the new one appears—this is normal and ensures a clean load of your new mod configuration.
